testCases.title: Configurable Hat PDP — Page Load and H1
testCases.notes: Page loaded at /products-with-options/configurable-caps-shirts/configurable-hat. H1: 'Configurable Hat'. SKU #YER-80407217. Build Ver. 2.48.0-alpha.2323-dev. Breadcrumbs: Home > Catalog > Products with options > Configurable caps & shirts > Configurable Hat.

testCases.title: Configurable Hat — 4 Configuration Sections Visible
testCases.notes: All 4 configuration sections present: (1) 'Select your fav color' (expanded, radiogroup), (2) 'Select print-ready cap' (collapsed, optional), (3) 'Customize text for your cap' (collapsed, optional), (4) 'Add photo' (collapsed, optional). Each collapsed section shows 'Personalize your selection further (optional)' subtitle.

testCases.title: Configurable Hat — Color Selection Radiogroup
testCases.notes: Color section expanded by default showing radiogroup with 5 options: Black hat ($10.00), Beige hat ($500.00), Green hat ($18.00), Red hat ($14.00), None (default selected). Each option has image, name, price, and quantity spinbutton (disabled). 'None' option available for deselection.

testCases.title: Configurable Hat — Price Update on Option Selection (VCST-4713)
testCases.notes: VCST-4713 verified: Base price $10.00. Selected 'Black hat' option ($10.00). Price in sidebar updated from $10.00 → $20.00 ($10 base + $10 option). 'Add to cart' button appeared and enabled. Price update is immediate and correct. Also verified in SMK-019.

testCases.title: Configurable Hat — Multiple Color Options Pricing
testCases.notes: All color options have individual prices visible: Black hat $10.00, Beige hat $500.00, Green hat $18.00, Red hat $14.00. Prices displayed inline in the radiogroup list next to each option. Quantity spinbutton shows '1' and is disabled (quantity managed at top level).

testCases.title: Configurable Hat — Add to Cart Button State
testCases.notes: With Black hat selected: 'Add to cart' button (ref e397) present and enabled. 'In stock' indicator shows '4551' units. Without option selected (None): Add to cart button is present (base product). Button correctly reflects selection state.

testCases.title: Configurable Hat — Text Customization Section
testCases.notes: Clicking 'Customize text for your cap' button expands section. Text input field appears: type=text, maxLength=255, placeholder empty. Field accepts text input. Section labeled as optional. File input also accessible (hasFileInput=true for Add Photo section which was already loaded).

testCases.title: Configurable Hat — File Upload Section (Add Photo)
testCases.notes: File input (type=file) present in the DOM for 'Add photo' section. Section visible in collapsed state with 'Personalize your selection further (optional)' label. File upload widget available.

testCases.title: Configurable Hat — Sidebar Price Display
testCases.notes: Price and delivery sidebar shows current price $20.00 (after Black hat selection). 'Price:' label present. Price updates dynamically based on option selection. Sidebar also shows 'Add to cart' button, 'In stock' count (4551), 'Add to list', 'Add to Compare', 'Share', 'Send link by email', 'Print' buttons.

testCases.title: Configurable Hat — Shipment Options in Sidebar
testCases.notes: Sidebar shows 'Shipment options' section with 'Check pickup locations' button (BOPIS integration). Pickup availability check available from PDP.

testCases.title: Configurable Hat — Product Image Display
testCases.notes: Product image loads for Configurable Hat (img 'Image 1'). Image gallery visible. 'Configure the parameters' header with configuration icon present above sections.

testCases.title: Configurable Hat — Breadcrumb Navigation
testCases.notes: Breadcrumbs correct: Home > Catalog > Products with options > Configurable caps & shirts > Configurable Hat. All breadcrumb links are functional with correct href values.

testCases.title: Configurable Hat — Customers Bought Together Section
testCases.notes: 'Customers bought together' section present with 5 related products: Hoodie Base with Only File non required ($300.00), Off-Road Bike Configurable product ($550.00), Base product EN ($1,999.00), MAGCOMSEN T-Shirts ($14.99), Nachos Chips 50x200g ($3.20). All products have images and links.

testCases.title: Configurable Hat — SKU Copy Button
testCases.notes: SKU display 'SKU #YER-80407217' present with adjacent Copy button. Standard PDP SKU display pattern.

testCases.title: Configurable Hat — None Option Deselection
testCases.notes: 'None' radio option available in color radiogroup for deselecting all color options. Default state has 'None' available. Allows user to configure without color option.

testCases.title: Configurable Hat — Print-Ready Cap Section (Collapsed)
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: 'Select print-ready cap' section remains collapsed during this run. Section header and 'optional' label verified present. Expanding and testing internal options deferred to Suite 072b E2E scenarios.

testCases.title: Configurable Hat — Option Deselect / Reset to Base Price
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Testing None selection resets price back to $10 base requires additional click sequence. Base price $10 and Black hat $20 pricing verified. Full reset cycle covered in Suite 072b.

testCases.title: Configurable Hat — Add to Cart with Option Selected E2E
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Full add-to-cart flow with Black hat option and cart verification covered in Suite 072b E2E. PDP add-to-cart button verified present and enabled. Smoke coverage: SMK-019 (option selection + price update).
